problem id: d2b4560f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00010100 -> 01010010
  11111000 -> 11111111
  00011100 -> 01110011
  11010011 -> 01010110
  01010111 -> 01010110
  11001000 -> 00111001
  10110000 -> 11010110
  11011000 -> 01111011

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 00101001
